name: mindstudio-to-api-custom-function-builder
displayName: MindStudio To API Custom Function Builder
description: Generates complete MindStudio Run Function integrations (Code Tab, Configuration Tab, Test Data Tab) for any API. Includes Sandbox-safe patterns, auth templates, and output variable best practices.
author: Sol

changelog.1.1.0: Added URLSearchParams Sandbox limitation to Common Mistakes. Added full list of unavailable Node/browser APIs in Sandbox notes.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release. Covers Code Tab, Configuration Tab, Test Data Tab generation. Includes auth patterns, Sandbox vs VM guidance, and output variable naming best practices.
